content.question: What is the quantitative magnitude of unmet prescribed habilitation/therapy hours, by school type and region, and what is the distribution of the gap between prescribed and delivered services?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a systematic audit of a stratified random sample of expert assessment opinions and corresponding service-delivery records from 2022–2024, comparing prescribed hours against delivered hours by service type (speech therapy, developmental instruction, etc.), school type (mainstream, special, foundation), and maintaining authority, with a pre-registered analysis plan.
